page_metadata.biotools__summary: Chronumental is a tool for creating a "time-tree" (where distance on the tree represents time) from a phylogenetic divergence-tree (where distance on the tree reflects a number of genetic substitutions).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Chronumental is a tool for creating a "time-tree" (where distance on the tree represents time) from a phylogenetic divergence-tree (where distance on the tree reflects a number of genetic substitutions).
